nasb.text: So they prepared the present for Joseph’s coming at noon; for they had heard that they were to eat a meal there.

esv.text: they prepared the present for Joseph’s coming at noon, for they heard that they should eat bread there.

cnv.text: 於是，他們預備好了禮物，等候約瑟中午到來，因為他們聽說他們要在那裡吃飯。

ccb.text: 他们知道要在那里吃午餐，就预备好礼物，等约瑟中午回来。

csbs.text: 他们听说他们要在那里吃饭，就预备好礼物，等候约瑟中午到来。
